perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a front-facing close-up of a young man with brown hair singing into a silver condenser microphone. He is wearing professional over-ear headphones and a tan shirt with a pinstriped vest. His eyes are often closed, and his facial expressions convey deep sadness and emotion. (2) The shot cuts to a profile view from his right side. He continues singing, using subtle hand gestures to emphasize the lyrics. (3) The camera cuts back to the front view as he reaches the emotional peak of the song, his expression becoming more intense. (4) The sequence of front and side cuts continues until the end of the clip, where he finishes his phrase and the video fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a melodic Mandopop ballad featuring acoustic guitar and piano. A male vocalist enters with a gentle, emotional tone. (2) As the song progresses, a soft drum beat and synthesized strings are added, increasing the energy. The vocalist's volume and intensity rise during the chorus section. (3) The song concludes with a final vocal phrase followed by a short melodic instrumental fade-out. No background noise or distracting SFX are present.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '來 你看著我的眼睛說' (Come, look into my eyes and say) - subtitle appearing at the bottom. (2) Functional Text: '你從沒愛過我' (You never loved me) - emotional lyric subtitle. (3) Functional Text: '再看著我的眼睛說' (Look into my eyes again and say). (4) Functional Text: '你一點都不難過' (You're not sad at all). (5) Functional Text: '我雖然沒那麼懂事' (Even though I'm not that sensible). (6) Functional Text: '但絕不攔你這一次' (But I definitely won't stop you this time). (7) Functional Text: '如果你說 想要回到有他在的城市' (If you say you want to return to the city where he is). (8) Functional Text: '我攥緊手裡的戒指' (I tighten the ring in my hand). (9) Functional Text: '它原本該有一個名字' (It should have had a name). (10) Functional Text: '如果你生日願望是 回到他身旁' (If your birthday wish is to return to his side). (11) Functional Text: '我幫你這最後一次' (I'll help you this one last time).

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To deliver a polished and emotionally resonant vocal performance of a popular ballad, showcasing the singer's talent and connecting with viewers through the shared experience of heartbreak.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The SONY logo on the headphones is visible but incidental to the studio setting.
